title: 3D render mode (vanilla static JSON model, BlockModel/ModelResource, direction-based rotation)
reference_files: C:/Users/GGxia/Desktop/YanbweMod/ModularShoot/设计文档.md#L1220-1231 (Render modes table: 3d vanilla static JSON model, no skeleton/animation)
C:/Users/GGxia/Desktop/YanbweMod/ModularShoot/设计文档.md#L1241-1242 (3d render details: BlockModel/ModelResource, vanilla model system, direction rotation)
acceptance_criteria: Model3DRenderer class loads vanilla static JSON model via BlockModel/ModelResource from BulletRenderObject.modelLocation
Model rendered using vanilla model system (no custom model loader, no skeleton, no animation)
Model rotated based on BulletRenderObject.direction (align model forward axis with direction vector)
Scale from BulletRenderObject.scale applied to model transform
Position interpolated using prevPosition, position, and partialTick (delegates to interpolation logic from subtask 11)
Rendered via PoseStack + VertexConsumer using vanilla item/block model rendering approach
